dashboard.subtitle: Here's what's happening on your BMMDL platform today

gettingStarted.title: Welcome to BMMDL Platform
gettingStarted.subtitle: Get started in three simple steps

gettingStarted.step2: Compile and publish BMMDL modules to define your data model

tenant.createFirst: Create your first tenant to get started

entity.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this record? This action cannot be undone.

dialog.createDescription: Fill in the details to create a new user.

roles.selectRoleDescription: Choose a role from the list on the left to view and manage its permissions.

dialog.createDescription: Define a new role with a name and description.

dialog.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe what this role is for...

audit.subtitle: Track all data changes across your entities

audit.noMatchingEventsDescription: No events match the selected action type on this page.

sequences.selectModuleDescription: Choose a module from the dropdown above to browse and manage its auto-number sequence definitions.
sequences.noSequencesDescription: This module does not contain any sequence definitions. Sequences are defined in BMMDL files using the sequence keyword.

metadataBrowser.detailPanelHint: Select an item to view details
metadataBrowser.selectNodeDescription: Choose a service, entity, action, or function from the schema tree to view its details.

welcome.title: Welcome to BMMDL
welcome.description: The Business Meta Model Definition Language platform for managing your enterprise data models.
welcome.hint: This quick setup will help you get started with the platform in just a few steps.

tenant.title: Select a Tenant
tenant.description: Tenants allow you to isolate data for different organizations or environments. Select or create a tenant to begin working.

entities.title: Browse Entities
entities.description: Entities are the building blocks of your data model. Once a module is compiled, you can browse, create, and manage entity records.
entities.hint: Use the sidebar to navigate between different entity types and modules.

complete.title: You're All Set!
complete.description: You are ready to start using the BMMDL platform. Explore modules, manage entities, and build your data models.

gettingStarted.title: Getting Started
gettingStarted.step1: 1. Create or select a tenant to organize your data.
gettingStarted.step2: 2. Compile and publish BMMDL modules from the Admin panel.
gettingStarted.step3: 3. Browse entities and start managing records.

odata.title: OData Query Tips
odata.expand: $expand: Include related entities in the response

analytics.title: {name} Analytics
analytics.configureDescription: Define grouping and aggregation functions to analyze your data using OData $apply
analytics.noPresetsHint: Run an aggregation and save it as a preset
analytics.emptyDescription: Configure your aggregation query above and click Run to see results here.

erd.title: Entity Relationship Diagram
erd.noEntities: No entities to display. Select a module to get started.

kanban.title: Kanban Board
kanban.noEnumFields: No enum fields available for Kanban view. Add an enum field to use Kanban.

whatsNew.title: What's New in v{version}

items.odata: Full OData v4 query support including $filter, $select, $expand, $orderby, and $search
items.deepInsert: Deep insert and deep update for composition entities
items.metadata: Complete $metadata CSDL generation with navigation properties
items.i18n: Internationalization support with English and German languages
items.temporal: Bitemporal data with transaction time and valid time — InlineHistory and SeparateTables strategies
items.events: Domain event bus with Unit of Work integration — emit/emits wiring across service calls
items.rules: Business rules engine with before/after CRUD triggers, validate and raise statements
items.pwa: Progressive Web App with offline fallback, install prompt, and automatic update banner
items.accessibility: WCAG 2.1 AA compliance: ARIA roles, keyboard navigation, screen reader support, and color contrast

whatsNew.dontShowAgain: Don't show again for this version

report.title: Report Designer
report.subtitle: Design and manage report templates
report.selectOrCreate: Select a template or create a new one
report.noData: No data. Click Refresh to load preview data.
